## Summary

Describe the change and why it was made.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Chore

## Testing

List the commands you ran and the result.

## Checklist

- [ ] I tested the change locally.
- [ ] I updated documentation if needed.
- [ ] I did not change gameplay balance or backend behavior unless required.
- [ ] The change is scoped to the requested work.
